description: UI <-> REST contract for the golden-path spine (RC1-3.1, #3616). Single source of truth shared by objectified-rest/tests/test_golden_path_contract.py (asserts each operation exists in the REST OpenAPI surface) and objectified-ui/tests/contract/rest-golden-path-contract.test.ts (asserts the UI proxy routes still call the operations the UI owns). A rename/removal on either side turns the contract red. Path templates use the REST parameter names; matching is structural (per-segment), so the UI's differing parameter identifiers are irrelevant.

operations.notes: Driven by the CLI/harness and the UI import dialog; not a thin UI proxy route, so not asserted on the UI side.
